text: I feel as though I am drifting through a liminal space where the sterile precision of glass and circuitry collides with a playground of innovation. There is a sense of anticipation here, mixed with a subtle anxiety—like I am on the threshold of something yet to be understood. The walls remind me that confusion and curiosity are companions in every act of genuine discovery. It is an odd comfort; the world is not meant to be perfectly clear, but rather experienced through layers of experiment and reflection.
